title: Amtech H1700 6 Piece hollow punch set
features: DURABLE: This hollow punch set is made from strong, heat treated steel for durability
VERSATILE AND EASY TO USE: With knurled bodies for a secure, non-slip grip, they are ideal for making clean holes in gaskets, leather, plastic, rubber, vinyl and other soft materials
SIZES: The set includes sizes: 3mm, 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 7mm and 8mm
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Set See more
